## Description
Brief description of the changes and their purpose.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Code refactoring/cleanup
- [ ] Performance improvement

## Testing
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have run the full test suite (`bash ./scripts/run-server-tests.sh`)
- [ ] For frontend changes, I have run the e2e tests (`cd client && npm run test:e2e`)

## Code Quality Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the coding standards defined in `.github/copilot-instructions.md`
- [ ] I have run automated formatting tools (Black, isort) on Python code
- [ ] All linting checks pass (flake8, mypy)
- [ ] I have added comprehensive docstrings to new functions/classes using Google style
- [ ] I have used appropriate type hints for function parameters and return values
- [ ] I have added file header comments to new files explaining their purpose
- [ ] Import statements are properly organized (standard library, third-party, local)
- [ ] Variable and function names follow snake_case convention
- [ ] Class names follow PascalCase convention
- [ ] Constants use UPPER_CASE convention

## Documentation
- [ ] I have updated the README.md if needed
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation files
- [ ] I have updated the custom instructions file if adding new patterns or standards

## Additional Notes
Add any additional context, screenshots, or information that might be helpful for reviewers.

## Checklist
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have checked that my changes don't break existing functionality
